description: Manufactures semiconductor production equipment and precision measuring instruments. Core products: wafer probing machines (world #1, 46% global share), wafer dicing machines (~10% global share), CMP equipment, polish grinders, edge grinders, and precision dicing blades. Brand name: ACCRETECH. Two segments: SPE (74% of sales) and Metrology (26%). Revenue FY2025/3: 150.5B JPY. China sales ratio: 34%.

majorClients: TSMC (CMP-0017) - dicing, probing, CMP
Samsung (CMP-0018) - dicing, probing
Intel (CMP-0019) - dicing, probing
SK Hynix (CMP-0020) - dicing, probing
Micron (CMP-0021) - dicing, probing
Kioxia (CMP-0014) - dicing, probing
ASE Technology (CMP-0063) - dicing, probing (world #1 OSAT)
Amkor (CMP-0064) - dicing, probing (world #2 OSAT)

SMIC (CMP-0066) - CMP, probing, dicing (China #1 foundry)
Tongfu Microelectronics (CMP-0067) - dicing, probing (China #2 OSAT)
Tianshui Huatian (CMP-0068) - dicing, probing (China #3 OSAT)
Powertech Technology (CMP-0069) - dicing, probing (Taiwan memory OSAT)

competitors: Hanmi Semiconductor (CMP-0072) - packaging equipment (Korea, TC bonders)
KCTech (CMP-0081) - CMP equipment (Korea, only domestic CMP maker, VENTUS system)

partners: Advantest (CMP-0005) - joint development of die-level prober for AI/HPC (announced Dec 2025)
_externalRelationships.notes: Together with DISCO, controls 90% of global dicing market. World #1 prober maker (46% share vs TEL 27%). China is 34% of sales - largest single geography. Key markets: Taiwan, China, Korea, USA, Japan. 28 subsidiaries in 18 countries. China operations: Accretech (China) Co., Ltd. in Shanghai Waigaoqiao Free Trade Zone with offices in Shanghai, Beijing, Suzhou, Shenzhen, Guangzhou, Xi'an, Changchun, Dalian, Nanjing. Chinese client base: 5 foundries (SMIC, Hua Hong, Nexchip, CanSemi, GTA Semi), 3 OSATs (JCET, Tongfu, Huatian), plus IDMs (CR Micro) and memory (YMTC pre-sanctions). Chinese competition accelerating across all product lines: probing (Sidea 25.7% domestic share, Changchuan developing 12-inch prober, NAURA entering), CMP (Huahai Qingke >50% domestic 12-inch share, CETC/Shuoke, TSD in compound semi), dicing (Guangli/ADT world #3, Heyan, Bojie Xin). Export controls (US/Japan) restrict equipment sales to Entity List companies like YMTC, accelerating domestic substitution (国产替代). Korean market faces localization threats from SEMES, SEMICS, KCTech. Key strategic risks: Chinese domestic substitution and Japan export control compliance.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, CNBC, TradingView, Accretech IR, Nikkei, industry reports, Japanese/Chinese/Korean language research
_metadata.notes: Q3 FY2026/3 revenue: 112.97B JPY (+9.5% YoY). Full year FY2025/3 revenue: 150.5B JPY (+11.8%). 52-week range: 6,148-16,170 JPY. Brand name: ACCRETECH. Joint die-level prober development with Advantest announced Dec 2025.
